---
title: "Blog Posts"
listing:
  contents: 
    - posts
    - projects
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  # we can remove image show here by not including the image in the fields
  fields: [title, subtitle, date, reading-time, categories]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
